Title: Page builder > Create Page
Steps:
Step Description:

Content module > Pages > Add > Design page

Expected Result:

System will open screen with information of page. Create button is unactive

Step Description:

Fill Name and Permalink fields

Expected Result:

Button Create is active

Step Description:

Click Create button

Expected Result:

System open new tabs in browser. Page builder will display.

Step Description:

Add few block to page > Fill some fields > Save

Expected Result:

System must display notification about success save.
Steps (Expected Result):
1.

System will open screen with information of page. Create button is unactive

2.

Button Create is active

3.

System open new tabs in browser. Page builder will display.

4.

System must display notification about success save.
Steps (Step):
1.

Content module > Pages > Add > Design page

2.

Fill Name and Permalink fields

3.

Click Create button

4.

Add few block to page > Fill some fields > Save

DesignPage_1 saved with new properties

2. Fill new Name and Permalink fields 
3. Click Save button

Title: Page builder > Edit page > Add any section

User sees all available sections
Step Description:
Click on + button for add section 
Expected Result:
Section was added. 
User sees added section in preview. User can edit content for section

Click Save > Open page in Preview
Expected Result:
System display save blocks

2. Section was added. 
User sees added section in preview. User can edit content for section

2. Click on + button for add section 
3. Click Save > Open page in Preview
